name: Chewathai Public Company Limited
summary: Chewathai Public Company Limited develops, rents, and sells residential projects in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Real Estate Business and Rental Business. The company develops and sells land, houses, townhomes, and residence condominium projects. It also owns, develops, and rents small and medium sized ready-built factories. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Chewathai Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Chartchewa Co., Ltd.
